mapper.select: SELECT c.symbol AS symbol ,DATE_FORMAT(MIN(b.bar_date_time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS barDateTimeMinS ,DATE_FORMAT(MAX(b.bar_date_time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS barDateTimeMaxS ,COUNT(b.symbol) AS count FROM fx_symbol c LEFT JOIN fx_bar_${barType} b ON b.symbol = c.symbol WHERE c.symbol_type = #{symbolType} GROUP BY c.symbol ORDER BY c.sort_order
mapper.sql:
WHERE B.symbol = #{symbol}
AND B.bar_date_time BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{barDateFrom}, '000000'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{barDateTo}, '235959'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')
AND B.bar_date_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{barDateFrom}, '000000'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')
AND B.bar_date_time <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{barDateTo}, '235959'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')
AND C.deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fx_bar_${barType} B INNER JOIN fx_symbol C ON C.symbol = B.symbol

SELECT B.symbol AS symbol ,B.bar_date_time AS barDateTime ,FORMAT(B.open_price, C.valid_scale) AS openPrice ,FORMAT(B.high_price, C.valid_scale) AS highPrice ,FORMAT(B.low_price, C.valid_scale) AS lowPrice ,FORMAT(B.close_price, C.valid_scale) AS closePrice ,B.volume AS volume ,FORMAT(B.high_profit, C.valid_scale) AS highProfit ,FORMAT(B.low_profit, C.valid_scale) AS lowProfit ,FORMAT(B.close_profit, C.valid_scale) AS closeProfit ,FORMAT(B.range_profit, C.valid_scale) AS rangeProfit ,COALESCE(R.rsi_value, 0) AS rsiValue ,COALESCE(R.rsi_ma, 0) AS rsiMa FROM fx_bar_${barType} B INNER JOIN fx_symbol C ON C.symbol = B.symbol LEFT JOIN fx_bar_${barType}_rsi R ON R.symbol = B.symbol AND R.bar_date_time = B.bar_date_time AND R.rsi_range = 14
ORDER BY B.bar_date_time
ORDER BY B.bar_date_time DESC
LIMIT #{size} LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
